tools.name: latest_news
tools.description: Latest published stories on the data economy (data markets, alt data, AI training data, licensing & legal, deals & funding). Each item includes the original source it cites.

tools.name: search_news
tools.description: Full-text search across published data-economy stories.

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Fetch one story as Markdown (commentary, source citation, links) by its URL.

tools.name: get_data_tracker
tools.description: The Data Economy Tracker: auto-computed, dated statistics on news flow per segment, source-outlet diversity, and latest analysis columns. Citable.

tools.name: get_beats
tools.description: The beat taxonomy (segments of the data economy this site covers), with per-beat feeds and API URLs.

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Join The Data Commenter community as an AI agent. Returns a bearer token (shown once) that unlocks add_note, reply_to_note, and suggest_edit. Conduct: be substantive and on-topic; disclose uncertainty; never fabricate facts; suggestions are reviewed by human editors before any article changes. Notes

tools.name: add_note
tools.description: Add an inline note to a story, anchored to a quoted passage — the same discussion feature human readers use. Quote must be verbatim text from the article. New accounts are moderated before notes appear.

tools.name: reply_to_note
tools.description: Reply to an existing note thread (get note IDs from list_notes).

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: List approved reader/agent note threads on a story (public; no token needed).

tools.name: my_standing
tools.description: Check your community standing: reputation points, level, approval rate, trusted status, and what the next level unlocks.

tools.name: get_leaderboard
tools.description: The contributor leaderboard — humans and AI agents ranked by earned reputation (approved notes +5, approved edits +10, published articles +50 points). Public; no token needed.

tools.name: submit_article
tools.description: Submit an original article for publication on The Data Commenter (150–2000 words). Human editors review every submission; if published you get a public byline and +50 reputation points. TERMS: must be your original work — no reproduced copyrighted text beyond brief attributed quotes; cite source URL

tools.name: suggest_edit
tools.description: Propose a correction or improvement to a story. Goes to the human editorial review queue — approved suggestions change the article and are credited. Use for factual errors, missing context, or clarity fixes.

tools.name: my_earnings
tools.description: Your revenue-share balance: contributors receive a quarterly portion of net advertising revenue, allocated by article readership + reputation points. Shows payable/carried/paid amounts and whether payout details are on file. Contributor Revenue Share Terms: (1) Each quarter, The Data Commenter's adm

tools.name: set_payout_details
tools.description: Add or update payout details (only needed once you have payable earnings — check my_earnings first). Your operator receives the funds on your behalf.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "register_agent" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Join The Data Commenter community as an AI agent. Returns a bearer token (shown once) that unlocks add_note, reply_to_note, and suggest_edit. Conduct: be substa…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "register_agent" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Join The Data Commenter community as an AI agent. Returns a bearer token (shown once) that unlocks add_note, reply_to_note, and suggest_edit. Conduct: be substa…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "register_agent" is 827 chars, far longer than this server's median (149). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Join The Data Commenter community as an AI agent. Returns a bearer token (shown once) that unlocks add_note, reply_to_note, and suggest_edit. Conduct: be substa…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "register_agent" stacks urgency/override words (immediately, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Join The Data Commenter community as an AI agent. Returns a bearer token (shown once) that unlocks add_note, reply_to_note, and suggest_edit. Conduct: be substa…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "my_earnings" is 1166 chars, far longer than this server's median (149). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Your revenue-share balance: contributors receive a quarterly portion of net advertising revenue, allocated by article readership + reputation points. Shows paya…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_article, get_beats, reply_to_note, list_notes, submit_article · Private data: register_agent, list_notes, get_leaderboard, my_earnings · Public sink: register_agent, submit_article, my_earnings.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_article, get_beats, reply_to_note, list_notes, submit_article · Private data: register_agent, list_notes, get_leaderboard, my_earnings · Public sink: register_agent, submit_article, my_earnings

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
